title_en: SpaceX Share Price Falls Below IPO Level After Volatile Trading
title_zh: SpaceX股价跌破IPO发行价，交易波动剧烈
summary_zh: SpaceX股价周三跌至132.62美元，低于6月135美元的IPO发行价。这一价格较上市后的盘中高点已下跌41%。该公司股价在经历初期投资者狂热后逐渐走低，近期受星链定价调整及AI业务整合等因素影响。市场分析师指出，目前缺乏新催化剂提振股价，但小幅跌破本身并不构成危机。
reading_passage:
Elon Musk became the world's first trillionaire when SpaceX floated

SpaceX's share price has dropped below its stock market debut just over a month ago, falling sharply from a post-float peak.

The price for a single share in Elon Musk's rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence (AI) company fell to $132.62 (Â£98.24) on Wednesday, below its initial listing of $135 in June.

SpaceX's initial public offering (IPO) made Musk the world's first trillionaire. Compared to its on-the-day high so far, the stock price is now down 41%.

If the price holds, or falls further, it will mean that those who purchased stock around the time of its flotation will stand to lose money on their investment.

Even amid a tumultuous few weeks for tech stocks, SpaceX has taken a particular hit.

Compared to a 0.2% fall on the wider Nasdaq index, where SpaceX's shares are listed, the company's stock price fell more than 2% on Wednesday.

SpaceX stock has been volatile since it began trading on the public stock market a little over one month ago.

After an initial investor frenzy that saw the company valued at more than Amazon and Microsoft, the price of its shares has drifted downward.

Initially, SpaceX was treated by investors as the first chance they had to invest in an AI company, according to what financial market analysts and experts recently told the BBC,

Earlier this year, SpaceX acquired Musk's AI start-up xAI, recently renamed SpaceXAI, marking its first foray into an AI-focused business.

XAI is best known for the controversial chatbot Grok, but through that acquisition, SpaceX now leases data centre capacity to other tech companies.

The company's main business is the manufacture and launch of rockets and telecommunications satellites called Starlink.

When Starlink said it was cutting prices in the Memphis, Tennessee area amid local concerns over a massive data centre project, SpaceX shares fell by 8%.

Steve Sosnick, chief market analyst at Interactive Brokers, told Reuters: "There hasn't been anything that lately to remind people of some of the catalysts for why they bought SpaceX."

SpaceX is expected to release in August its first public earnings report.

Sosnick added: "The fact that a stock has fallen a couple of dollars below its IPO price in itself is not a tragedy, but SpaceX is heavily watched and has an important role in investor psyche."

SpaceX did not immediately respond to a request for comment.

vocabulary.example: The country experienced a tumultuous period after the revolution.
Oil prices are notoriously volatile due to geopolitical tensions.
The announcement sparked a frenzy among investors.
The company's foray into electric vehicles has been met with skepticism.
The tech startup's initial public offering was oversubscribed within hours.
The company's stock market debut was one of the most anticipated this year.
The new cryptocurrency sparked a global investor frenzy.
The temperature is expected to fall below freezing tonight.
After the initial excitement, interest in the project drifted downward.

vocabulary.meaning_zh: 催化剂；促使变化的人或事
vocabulary.example: The new policy served as a catalyst for economic reform.

difficult_sentences.sentence: SpaceX's share price has dropped below its stock market debut just over a month ago, falling sharply from a post-float peak.
difficult_sentences.explanation_zh: 主句为“SpaceX's share price has dropped below its stock market debut just over a month ago”，现在分词短语“falling sharply from a post-float peak”作伴随状语，说明股价下跌的幅度和比较基准。
difficult_sentences.grammar_point: 现在分词短语作伴随状语
difficult_sentences.translation_zh: 刚刚过去一个多月，SpaceX的股价就已跌破其股市首秀价格，较上市后的高点大幅下挫。

difficult_sentences.sentence: If the price holds, or falls further, it will mean that those who purchased stock around the time of its flotation will stand to lose money on their investment.
difficult_sentences.explanation_zh: 该句为第一条件句，主句“it will mean”后接由that引导的宾语从句，宾语从句中又包含“who purchased stock around the time of its flotation”修饰“those”的定语从句。“stand to lose”表示“有可能损失”。
difficult_sentences.grammar_point: 第一条件句；定语从句；短语“stand to do”
difficult_sentences.translation_zh: 如果股价维持不变或进一步下跌，这将意味着那些在公司上市前后购买股票的人有可能亏损。

difficult_sentences.sentence: After an initial investor frenzy that saw the company valued at more than Amazon and Microsoft, the price of its shares has drifted downward.
difficult_sentences.explanation_zh: “After an initial investor frenzy”为时间状语，后跟that引导的定语从句修饰“frenzy”，主句为“the price of its shares has drifted downward”。“drifted downward”为短语动词，表示“逐渐下跌”。
difficult_sentences.grammar_point: 时间状语从句；定语从句；短语动词
difficult_sentences.translation_zh: 在初始的投资者狂热使公司估值超过亚马逊和微软之后，其股价已逐渐下跌。

difficult_sentences.sentence: When Starlink said it was cutting prices in the Memphis, Tennessee area amid local concerns over a massive data centre project, SpaceX shares fell by 8%.
difficult_sentences.explanation_zh: “When Starlink said...”为时间状语从句，其中“it was cutting prices...”为said的宾语从句；“amid local concerns over a massive data centre project”为介词短语作状语，说明背景。主句为“SpaceX shares fell by 8%”。
difficult_sentences.grammar_point: 时间状语从句；宾语从句；介词短语作状语
difficult_sentences.translation_zh: 当星链表示因当地对一个大型数据中心项目的担忧而在田纳西州孟菲斯地区降价时，SpaceX股价下跌了8%。

idioms.usage_note: 非正式用语，常用于商务或财经语境，指价值、销量等显著下降。
idioms.example: The company's reputation took a hit after the scandal.

idioms.usage_note: 用于描述潜在的风险或不利结果，后接具体内容，如金钱或机会。
idioms.example: If the deal falls through, we stand to lose millions.

idioms.usage_note: 用于强调某事物独立来看的性质，常与否定或限定词连用，表示不构成重大问题。
idioms.example: The mistake, in itself, is not fatal, but the cover-up could be.

reading_questions.question: What is the main idea of the article?

options.A: Elon Musk's wealth from SpaceX is now over a trillion dollars.
options.B: SpaceX's new AI division is the primary driver of its stock decline.
options.C: Starlink's pricing changes have had no impact on SpaceX shares.
options.D: SpaceX's stock price has fallen below its initial listing after a period of volatility.

reading_questions.question: What happened to the SpaceX share price on Wednesday?

options.B: It dropped to $132.62, below its IPO price of $135.
options.D: It fell to a new all-time low of $98.24.

reading_questions.question: What can be inferred from the stock's 41% decline from its post-IPO high?

options.A: The company's fundamentals have suddenly weakened.
options.B: SpaceX will be delisted from the Nasdaq.
options.C: The initial investor excitement has not been maintained.
options.D: The stock is greatly undervalued and set to surge.

reading_questions.question: The phrase 'stand to lose' in paragraph 4 most likely means:

options.B: to be in a position to lose

reading_questions.question: What is the author's overall attitude toward the SpaceX stock development?
How does the author organize the information in this passage?

options.A: By listing the steps for investing in SpaceX.
options.B: By reporting the main event, providing background and contributing factors, and including analyst commentary.
options.C: By comparing SpaceX with other Musk companies.
options.D: By presenting a strict timeline of SpaceX stock prices.

reading_questions.question: Which of the following is the best title for this passage?

options.A: Elon Musk: The World's First Trillionaire
options.B: SpaceX Shares Dip Below IPO Price Amid Market Volatility
options.C: Starlink Price Cuts Cause Investor Panic
options.D: SpaceXAI: A New Frontier in Artificial Intelligence

sources.title: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
